---
title: "DHEA BARU"
author: "Dhea Adventina Sandy"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(outliers)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(csv)


df <- read.csv(
  "C:/Users/ACER/Downloads/ovarian_cancer_CA125_dataset.csv",
  sep = ";"
)

data <- df[c("CA125_U_per_mL", "Overall_Survival_Months")]

total_missing <- sum(is.na(data))
total_missing

detect_outliers <- function(data) {
  cat("\n=== DETEKSI OUTLIER ===\n\n")
  
  outlier_report <- list()
  
  for(var in names(data)[sapply(data, is.numeric)]) {
    cat("Analisis outlier untuk variabel:", var, "\n")
    
    # Statistik deskriptif
    stats <- summary(data[[var]])
    iqr_val <- IQR(data[[var]], na.rm = TRUE)
    q1 <- quantile(data[[var]], 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
    q3 <- quantile(data[[var]], 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
    lower_bound <- q1 - 1.5 * iqr_val
    upper_bound <- q3 + 1.5 * iqr_val
    
    # Deteksi outlier dengan metode IQR
    outliers_iqr <- data[[var]][data[[var]] < lower_bound | data[[var]] > upper_bound]
    
    # Deteksi outlier dengan metode Z-score
    z_scores <- scale(data[[var]])
    outliers_z <- data[[var]][abs(z_scores) > 3]
    
    # Deteksi outlier dengan metode Grubbs (uji statistik)
    if(length(na.omit(data[[var]])) > 6) {
      tryCatch({
        grubbs_test <- grubbs.test(na.omit(data[[var]]))
        grubbs_outlier <- ifelse(grubbs_test$p.value < 0.05, "Terdeteksi", "Tidak terdeteksi")
      }, error = function(e) {
        grubbs_outlier <- "Tidak dapat dihitung"
      })
    } else {
      grubbs_outlier <- "Data tidak cukup"
    }
    
    # Ringkasan
    outlier_report[[var]] <- list(
      n_outliers_iqr = length(outliers_iqr),
      n_outliers_z = length(outliers_z),
      grubbs_result = grubbs_outlier,
      lower_bound = lower_bound,
      upper_bound = upper_bound,
      outlier_values = unique(round(outliers_iqr, 2))
    )
    
    cat("  - Outlier (IQR method):", length(outliers_iqr), "\n")
    cat("  - Outlier (Z-score > 3):", length(outliers_z), "\n")
    cat("  - Uji Grubbs:", grubbs_outlier, "\n")
    cat("  - Batas bawah:", round(lower_bound, 2), "\n")
    cat("  - Batas atas:", round(upper_bound, 2), "\n")
    
    if(length(outliers_iqr) > 0) {
      cat("  - Nilai outlier:", paste(head(unique(round(outliers_iqr, 2)), 5), collapse = ", "), "\n")
    }
    cat("\n")
  }
  
  return(outlier_report)
}

# Deteksi outlier
outlier_analysis <- detect_outliers(data)

# =========================================
# DETEKSI INCONSISTENCY
# =========================================

cat("=== CEK INCONSISTENCY ===\n")

# 1. Nilai tidak logis
cat("\nCA125 negatif:", sum(df$CA125_U_per_mL < 0, na.rm=TRUE))
cat("\nSurvival negatif:", sum(df$Overall_Survival_Months < 0, na.rm=TRUE))

# 2. Range tidak wajar
cat("\nCA125 terlalu besar (>5000):", 
    sum(df$CA125_U_per_mL > 5000, na.rm=TRUE))

# 3. Cek kategori tidak konsisten
unique(df$Survival_Status)

# 4. Cek duplikasi
duplicated_rows <- sum(duplicated(df))
cat("\nJumlah duplikasi:", duplicated_rows)

df_clean <- na.omit(df)
summary(data)

#Histogram distribusi CA-125
ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = CA125_U_per_mL)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribusi CA-125",
    x = "CA-125 (U/mL)",
    y = "Frekuensi"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#Histogram Overall Survival
ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = Overall_Survival_Months)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribusi Overall Survival",
    x = "Overall Survival (Months)",
    y = "Frekuensi"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#Boxplot untuk deteksi outlier visual CA-125
ggplot(df_clean, aes(y = CA125_U_per_mL)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Boxplot CA-125",
    y = "CA-125 (U/mL)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#Boxplot untuk deteksi outlier visual Survival
ggplot(df_clean, aes(y = Overall_Survival_Months)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(
    title = "Boxplot Overall Survival",
    y = "Overall Survival (Months)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

#Scatter plot hubungan
ggplot(df_clean, aes(x = CA125_U_per_mL,
                     y = Overall_Survival_Months)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  labs(
    title = "Hubungan CA-125 vs Overall Survival",
    x = "CA-125 (U/mL)",
    y = "Overall Survival (Months)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# =========================================
# KORELASI PEARSON + INTERPRETASI
# =========================================

# Pilih variabel
variabel_x <- df_clean$CA125_U_per_mL
variabel_y <- df_clean$Overall_Survival_Months

# Hitung korelasi Pearson
hasil <- cor.test(variabel_x, variabel_y, method = "pearson")

korelasi_pearson <- hasil$estimate
p_value <- hasil$p.value

cat(sprintf("\nKorelasi Pearson: %.3f\n", korelasi_pearson))

# =========================================
# Interpretasi kekuatan korelasi
# =========================================

if (korelasi_pearson > 0.8) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi sangat kuat positif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson > 0.6) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi kuat positif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson > 0.4) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi sedang positif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson > 0.2) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi lemah positif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson > 0) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi sangat lemah positif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson < -0.8) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi sangat kuat negatif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson < -0.6) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi kuat negatif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson < -0.4) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi sedang negatif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson < -0.2) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi lemah negatif"
} else if (korelasi_pearson < 0) {
  interpretasi <- "Korelasi sangat lemah negatif"
} else {
  interpretasi <- "Tidak ada korelasi linier"
}

cat("Interpretasi:", interpretasi, "\n")

# =========================================
# Uji hipotesis
# =========================================

alpha <- 0.05

cat(sprintf("P-value: %.3f\n", p_value))
cat(sprintf("Tingkat Signifikansi (alpha): %.2f\n", alpha))

if (p_value < alpha) {
  keputusan <- "Tolak Hipotesis Nol (H0)"
  interpretasi_uji <- paste(
    "Ada bukti statistik yang cukup untuk menyimpulkan",
    "adanya hubungan linier yang signifikan antara variabel."
  )
} else {
  keputusan <- "Gagal Menolak Hipotesis Nol (H0)"
  interpretasi_uji <- paste(
    "Tidak ada bukti statistik yang cukup untuk menyimpulkan",
    "adanya hubungan linier yang signifikan antara variabel."
  )
}

cat("\nKeputusan:", keputusan, "\n")
cat("Interpretasi Uji:", interpretasi_uji, "\n")
``` 
```
